verdict_prose: **Verdict — the architecture has no effective security boundary at any layer.** Every cross-cutting security pattern that would normally catch a control failure is absent or deliberately disabled.
framing: Three cross-cutting weaknesses drive the majority of findings:

weaknesses.description: The RSA private key used to sign session tokens is committed to the public repository; every authentication control is undermined from the moment the repo is cloned.
SQL construction uses raw string interpolation in login and search; there is no central input validator on these paths.
bypassSecurityTrustHtml is used in six Angular components, disabling DOM sanitization wholesale.
